titleStmt.title: SII 41.132: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 132. (A.R. No. 131 of 1905.) Kaḷakkāḍu. Nāṅgunēri Taluk, Tirunelvēli District. On the north wall of the Satyavagisvara temple at Kaḷakkāḍu.

p.hi: Travncore king (name not given), Kollam 688 = 1512 A.D.

summary.p: From his camp at Vēḷākuṟichchi the king assigned the services of some kuḍi as the fifteenth member in the temple at Kaḷakkāḍu. The document was written by Mārttāṇḍan Mārttāṇḍaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . Aruḷicceyal peṇṭukaḷil Aṅkayakkaṇ nācciyāṟku vāṉavaṉṉāṭṭu paccāṟṟup pokku kaḷakkāṭāṉa coḻakulavallipurattu nayiṉār puraveriyicccuvaram Uṭai
yanayiṉār koyilukku taimātam patiṉañcāntiyati mutalukku patiṉañcāṅkuṭi Āka Akak kuṭikku kuṭutta vaṇṇam turamum ceyutu cuvarantiriyaṅkaḷum coṟum paṟṟik koṇṭu Ācantiratāravaṟ cantatippi
ṟavēcamē Ittaravu piṭipāṭāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭi kaiyyāṇṭu koḷḷumpaṭi Aṟunūṟṟu Eṇpattu Eṭṭām Āṇṭu taimātam patiṉañcānteyti veḷākuṟicciyil putiya viṭṭil
nām viṭāy Irukka kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Itu taravākum Ivai mārttāṇṭaṉ māttāṇṭaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 41.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
